privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that the task is a fully generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new EdrawMax employee ID badge from scratch. Verified the expected output paths (/home/ga/Documents/nexus_id_badge.eddx and .png), the required textual labels, the custom CR80 page dimensions (2.13x3.38 inches), and the expected QR code content exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and verifier.py logic.
